3.title: Installation
3.label: Installation
3.snippet: AgentSecrets is available via Homebrew, npm, pip, and Go. The CLI, proxy, Python SDK, and MCP template are MIT licensed.

4.title: Homebrew (macOS / Linux) — recommended
4.label: Installation
4.snippet: Homebrew handles updates automatically and is the recommended installation method on macOS and Linux.

5.title: npm
5.label: Installation
5.snippet: Installs the CLI globally. Suitable for Node.js environments and teams already using npm for tooling.

599.title: agentsecrets init
599.label: init / login / logout
599.snippet: Creates your account, generates encryption keys locally, and sets up your first workspace. On returning machines, detect…

600.title: agentsecrets login
600.label: init / login / logout
600.snippet: Authenticates an existing account on a new machine. Does not generate new keys — pulls your existing workspace key from …

601.title: agentsecrets logout
601.label: init / login / logout
601.snippet: Clears the local session. Does not delete your keychain entries or cloud secrets.

602.title: agentsecrets status
602.label: init / login / logout
602.snippet: Shows current user, workspace, project, environment, proxy status, and last sync time. Run this before any secrets opera…

604.title: agentsecrets secrets set
604.label: secrets
604.snippet: Stores a secret in the OS keychain for the active project and environment. The value goes directly to the keychain — nev…

605.title: agentsecrets secrets get
605.label: secrets
605.snippet: Retrieves a secret value to your terminal. This is the one command that shows you the value — it is intended for the hum…

606.title: agentsecrets secrets list
606.label: secrets
606.snippet: Lists key names for the current project and environment. Shows cross environment coverage so you can see which keys are …

607.title: agentsecrets secrets delete
607.label: secrets
607.snippet: Removes a secret from the active environment. Permanent.

608.title: agentsecrets secrets push
608.label: secrets
608.snippet: Uploads secrets to the cloud, encrypted client side before upload. Storage mode 1: reads from the OS keychain and pushes…

609.title: agentsecrets secrets pull
609.label: secrets
609.snippet: Downloads secrets from the cloud to the local OS keychain. Storage mode 1: writes to the OS keychain only. Storage mode …

610.title: agentsecrets secrets diff
610.label: secrets
610.snippet: Compares local state against cloud for the active environment. Shows which keys exist in one environment but are missing…

612.title: agentsecrets environment switch
612.label: environment
612.snippet: Switches the active environment. Valid values: , , . Updates in the current directory and the global config fallback. In…

613.title: agentsecrets environment list
613.label: environment
613.snippet: Lists all three environments and the number of secrets in each for the current project.

614.title: agentsecrets environment copy
614.label: environment
614.snippet: Copies all secrets from one environment to another with the same values. Prompts for confirmation if the destination has…

615.title: agentsecrets environment merge
615.label: environment
615.snippet: Takes key names from the source environment and prompts for new values in the destination. Press Enter to skip a key. Us…

616.title: agentsecrets environment clean
616.label: environment
616.snippet: Deletes all secrets in the current environment. Permanent. Requires confirmation.

618.title: agentsecrets workspace create
618.label: workspace
618.snippet: Creates a new workspace. You are the admin.

619.title: agentsecrets workspace list
619.label: workspace
619.snippet: Lists all workspaces you belong to.

620.title: agentsecrets workspace switch
620.label: workspace
620.snippet: Switches the active workspace. All subsequent commands operate in this workspace.

621.title: agentsecrets workspace invite
621.label: workspace
621.snippet: Sends an invitation to a teammate. They join by accepting the invitation and running .

622.title: agentsecrets workspace promote / demote
622.label: workspace
622.snippet: Grants or revokes admin role. Requires admin and password confirmation.

623.title: agentsecrets workspace allowlist add
623.label: workspace
623.snippet: Authorizes one or more domains. Requires admin and password confirmation.

625.title: agentsecrets workspace allowlist log
625.label: workspace
625.snippet: Shows blocked request attempts — requests the proxy rejected because the domain was not authorized.

627.title: agentsecrets project create
627.label: project
627.snippet: Creates a project in the current workspace.

628.title: agentsecrets project list
628.label: project
628.snippet: Lists all projects in the current workspace.

629.title: agentsecrets project use
629.label: project
629.snippet: Sets the active project. All secrets commands operate against this project.

631.title: agentsecrets project delete
631.label: project
631.snippet: Deletes the project and all its secrets. Permanent. Requires confirmation.

632.title: agentsecrets project invite
632.label: project
632.snippet: Invites a teammate to a specific project.

634.title: agentsecrets proxy start
634.label: proxy
634.snippet: Starts the local proxy. Default port is 8765.

636.title: agentsecrets proxy status
636.label: proxy
636.snippet: Shows whether the proxy is running, which port, and the current revocation list sync status.

637.title: agentsecrets proxy logs
637.label: proxy
637.snippet: Views or streams the local proxy audit log. Filters by key name or environment.

639.title: agentsecrets call — full flag reference
639.label: call
639.snippet: Makes a single authenticated request through the proxy. All six injection styles are supported. Multiple injection flags…

641.title: --basic
641.label: call
641.snippet: Injects as . Expects a secret containing .

644.title: --body-field
644.label: call
644.snippet: Injects into a JSON body field at the specified path.

648.title: agentsecrets mcp serve
648.label: mcp
648.snippet: Starts the MCP server. Called by the MCP config — you do not run this manually.

649.title: agentsecrets mcp install
649.label: mcp
649.snippet: Auto configures Claude Desktop and Cursor with the MCP server. Detects installation paths and writes configs automatical…

651.title: agentsecrets env -- <command>
651.label: env
651.snippet: Injects secrets as environment variables into a child process at spawn time. The parent process never holds the values. …

653.title: agentsecrets log list
653.label: log
653.snippet: Views the global backend audit log. streams live. filters by agent name. finds calls with no agent identity set.

654.title: agentsecrets log summary
654.label: log
654.snippet: Aggregate statistics: call counts, top keys, top agents, error rates.

655.title: agentsecrets log export
655.label: log
655.snippet: Exports audit log entries for compliance review or external analysis.

656.title: agentsecrets log detail
656.label: log
656.snippet: Full detail for a specific log entry, including the domain allowlist snapshot at time of call.

658.title: agentsecrets agent list
658.label: agent
658.snippet: Lists all named agents that have made at least one call in the current workspace.

659.title: agentsecrets agent delete
659.label: agent
659.snippet: Deletes an agent identity and revokes all its tokens. Permanent.

660.title: agentsecrets agent token issue
660.label: agent
660.snippet: Issues a cryptographically signed token for an agent. Shown once — store it immediately.

661.title: agentsecrets agent token list
661.label: agent
661.snippet: Lists active tokens for an agent. Shows token ID, creation date, and last used date. Never shows token values.

662.title: agentsecrets agent token revoke
662.label: agent
662.snippet: Revokes a specific token. Other tokens for the same agent remain active.
